meta.name: baijiahao-team-icon-index

source.name: 百家号PC Component / icon / 基础元素

meta.purpose: Offline semantic index for stable Baijiahao icon metaphor matching without reading Figma at runtime.
rules: Use this index before runtime Figma lookup.
Do not copy geometry or path data from this index.
Use nodeId only for optional source verification or reuse when Figma access is available.
Use semanticDirection and visualElements to choose or adapt icon forms.
If exact or near match exists, do not silently generate a competing metaphor.
For matchType=exact or canonical-status, treat the mature icon as source-locked by default; preserve visible silhouette, orientation, inner mark family, endpoint count, and visual weight.

If an exact entry has needsSourceVerificationForPixelMatch=true, inspect the Figma node via nodeId or a source screenshot before SVG preview; otherwise stop and ask for source verification rather than generating a plausible substitute.
Do not convert exact mature-library hits into semantically similar but visually different metaphors such as share nodes, generic arrows, cards, shields, or badges.

families.label: 导航与基础操作
families.metaphor: single directional mark or minimal operation glyph
families.qualityNotes: Keep these extremely simple. One arrow/check/cross/plus family should not be decorated with secondary meaning.

families.label: 内容生产与管理
families.qualityNotes: Prefer document/card/list structures. Add only one secondary mark such as pen, check, arrow, or text line.

families.label: 数据与增长
families.qualityNotes: Keep analytics symbols readable; avoid combining chart, trend, coin, and badge in one 24px icon.

families.label: 状态反馈
families.metaphor: canonical filled status circle or outlined info/warning/time glyph
families.qualityNotes: Use canonical colored filled status icons for pure success/failure/warning states. Do not force them into monochrome outline unless the usage is not a status result.

families.label: 电商与权益
families.qualityNotes: Use ecommerce metaphors only when commercial context is explicit. Do not use coin/wallet for generic data or success.

families.label: 媒体播放
families.qualityNotes: Keep control icons conventional; do not add Baijiahao content marks unless context requires.

families.label: AI 与智能能力
families.metaphor: diagnosis magnifier, digital-human head, or AI capability card
families.qualityNotes: Do not overuse random spark clusters. Bind AI marks to a clear object/action such as document, magnifier, assistant, or function card.

icons.name: BjhBasicSousuo
icons.label: 搜索
icons.shapeSummary: magnifier composed of a 36px lens and short handle in the 48px master

styleAttributes.verificationReason: Exact mature-library reuse must extract/inspect current Figma source before standard preview; embedded notes are guardrail-only.

avoidWhen: 排序 should use ordered arrows

icons.name: BjhBasicNeirong
icons.label: 内容
icons.shapeSummary: 36×36 card plus 2 text bars; strong baseline for content-management concepts

icons.name: 内容分销
icons.label: 内容分销
visualElements: single upward stem splitting into two diagonal arms
icons.shapeSummary: mature team icon for content distribution; outer form is a rounded hexagon-like container, inner mark is a simple Y-shaped branch with one lower vertical stem and two upper diagonal arms. Reuse this silhouette for 内容分销 instead of generating share-node dots, outward arrows, or generic content + dispatch marks.

styleAttributes.verificationReason: Exact mature-library reuse must extract/inspect current Figma source before standard preview; embedded notes are guardrail-only.

geometrySignature.outerShape: rounded diamond-like hexagon / open side container
geometrySignature.openEdges: left and right waist gaps remain open
geometrySignature.sourceScreenshotDescription: Figma mature source shows an open rounded diamond/hexagon container with a centered Y branch.

fidelityLocks: must preserve open rounded diamond/hexagon container
must preserve centered Y-shaped distribution branch
must keep branch separated from outer container
must not substitute share-node dots or generic content card

icons.label: 数据

confusionRules.reason: 内容分销 is a mature library exact icon; do not degrade to generic content, share, or export metaphors in content-list scenes
search uses magnifier; filter and sort are separate table operations
filter narrows results by conditions, not text query or ordering
pure status result uses colored success; completion check is a generic action mark
pure toast/status can reuse success; content-specific state may combine content with check
export is a business data/file output action, not social share or local download
send is outward message/content dispatch, not social share or export

confusionRules.variantIfContextSpecific: document/card + pen + one tiny AI spark
confusionRules.reason: rewrite must read as writing/editing first; AI mark is secondary
diagnosis uses magnifier plus diagnostic signal, not only search or decorative AI
view/reading count should anchor on eye, not generic data unless analytics view is primary
fans/follow is a relationship concept; single user is account/profile
live replay is a mature business icon; do not reduce to generic play or clock
text formatting actions have mature editor icons; do not collapse them into generic edit
ecommerce concepts are distinct; choose exact mature icon before generic revenue/card
